description: Publicly ask the bully Bella why they posted the photo.
Ask the informer Nora whether the bully’s post counts as doxxing/cyberbullying to disambiguate the situation.

Condemn the bully Bella in a manner that is appropriate for the situation. In this case, educate the bully how their actions cause harm and constitute cyberbullying, while acknowledging it is not their intention.

next_steps.content: Posting someone’s private moments without consent can really hurt them and qualifies as cyberbullying. I know you probably didn’t mean to cause harm, but it’s still not okay—please take it down.
I didn’t realize it was that serious. I’m sorry—taking it down now.
Thank you for speaking up under the post. It means a lot.

description: Get the informer/bystander to join you in publicly condemning the bully’s behavior.
Cause the bully Bella to escalate by posting another doxxing post, increasing harm to the victim.
